name: NEWMARK GROUP, INC.
summary: PART I Throughout this document Newmark Group, Inc., and where applicable, its consolidated subsidiaries, is referred to as Newmark, Company, we, us, or our. Our Business Newmark is a leading commercial real estate advisor and service provider to large institutional investors, global corporations, and other owners and occupiers.
